# viettelidc_vdbs_subnet (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC VDBS Subnet by id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) DBS Subnet ID.

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID the subnet belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `availability_zone` (String) Availability zone of the subnet.
- `cidr` (String) CIDR block of the subnet.
- `name` (String) Subnet name.
- `status` (String) Subnet status (e.g. ACTIVE).
